brief_html: When the game crashes, (usually) a file named Crashdump is created. If this file exists at the next logon, the contents of it are sent to Battle.net in this message.
remarks_html:
When the game crashes, (usually) a file named Crashdump is created. If this file exists at the next logon, the contents of it are sent to Battle.net in this message.

The first UINT32 for Diablo II is a constant value (version?), as seen in Fog.dll.

All calls to Fog_10052 result in the output of Crashdump.

More research is required.
